primary_files.change:
Replace on-mount mockClient placeholder with a real form (query text input +
submit button), fetch-based POST to /query, loading/error state, and rendering of the
synthesized answer plus a list of clickable cited file paths.

New component test file (RTL) mocking global fetch's /query response, asserting
submit calls fetch with expected body, and that answer text + citation links render.

dependent_files.change:
The existing 6.1.1 router test's generic it.each loop asserts a
data-testid="query-status" element appears on mount for the /query route, which no longer
exists once QueryView stops calling fetchQueryResult on mount. Minimal targeted update: the
/query row's assertion now checks for the always-rendered query form (data-testid=
"query-form") instead, keeping the rest of the already-verified 6.1.1 router test unchanged.
dependent_files.reason: Necessary to keep already-verified 6.1.1 test suite green; not a re-implementation of 6.1.1 scope.

not_impacted: ui/src/api/mockClient.ts (fetchQueryResult stub left as-is for other views' reference; no other view imports it for Query)
api/routes/query.go (contract already fixed by 6.1.1-era backend work; read-only reference)
blast_radius: Confined to ui/ workspace; no backend/engine/agents changes. Builds directly on 6.1.1's already-merged app shell.
rollback: Revert the single commit produced by this subtask; QueryView.tsx/App.test.tsx return to 6.1.1 placeholder state.
